column1: # Farsi (Persian) harakat — diacritical marks. The `mark` shows the diacritic on
# a carrier ب (marks can't stand alone). `effect` = plain-English role. ex1..ex4
# are usage examples with romanization: the five vowel marks demo on consonant
# syllables; the structural marks (tashdid/madd/hamze) demo in short real words.
